overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The journey begins on a sunny downtown sidewalk, crosses a busy intersection, and continues through covered walkways and alleys with vibrant neon signage and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing the futuristic cityscape

notable_agents.action: man in beige suit walking past the camera from left to right

entered.detail: tall reflective glass building with multiple floors and greenery on terraces
large digital billboard displaying advertisements on the distant building facade
futuristic pedestrian bridge connecting two buildings across the street
dark building with cyan neon trim and large digital displays
tall palm tree visible in the distance along the street
modern street lamp with digital display panel

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit futuristic city sidewalk with towering glass buildings on the left and neon-trimmed structures on the right. The elevated walkway bridge is visible in the distance against a clear blue sky, while sparse pedestrians walk in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

black vehicle passes by on the left while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection following the crosswalk lines with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the road surface
distinctive blue painted section of the road at the intersection

segments.scene_description: Crossing a wide urban intersection with distinctive blue painted road sections and yellow crosswalk lines. The camera moves through moderate pedestrian traffic while vehicles pass on the left, with massive neon billboards and skyscrapers framing the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass entrance with neon lighting

turns right into covered walkway under the building structure

agents.ego_description: turning right to enter the covered walkway, transitioning from open street to sheltered passage

entered.detail: dark concrete overpass creating a covered tunnel effect
bright cyan neon light strips running along the ceiling of the underpass
smooth dark concrete wall of the building on the right side

segments.scene_description: Turning right into a covered underpass area where bright sunlight gives way to shadow and cyan neon lighting. The environment shifts from open sky to a sheltered walkway with dark building walls and artificial illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with vending machines and neon advertisements

events.description: passes extensive wall of vending machines with colorful product displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered passage, passing vending machines and approaching the open area ahead

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking toward the camera through the passage

entered.detail: long wall of illuminated vending machines displaying various colorful products
large digital advertisement screen on the left wall showing animated content
tables and chairs arranged outside a cafe under umbrellas
distinctive building with green spiral neon lighting visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Proceeding through a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by cyan neon strips overhead. A long wall of colorful vending machines lines the right side, while digital billboards and an outdoor seating area are visible on the left. The green spiral building becomes visible ahead through the semi-covered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with pawn shop and green neon lighting

events.description: enters narrower alleyway with distinct green neon aesthetic and pawn shop signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow green-lit alley, passing the pawn shop and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person standing near the wall looking at a device

entered.detail: building wrapped in bright green neon spiral lighting
green neon sign reading PAWN SHOP on the building facade
tall dark wall enclosing the right side of the narrow passage
illuminated advertising kiosk displaying character posters

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrower alleyway characterized by green neon lighting and a prominent Pawn Shop sign. The spiral green neon structure dominates the left side as the path becomes more enclosed, with scattered pedestrians and digital poster stands visible along the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open city center into the shadowed, neon-drenched depths of a futuristic urban district. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk flanked by towering glass skyscrapers and neon-trimmed buildings under a clear blue sky. As the camera crosses a wide intersection marked by blue road sections and yellow crosswalks, the open vista is framed by massive billboards before turning right into a covered underpass. The environment then shifts from natural sunlight to artificial cyan illumination, moving through a sheltered walkway lined with colorful vending machines and digital displays. Finally, the path narrows into an enclosed alleyway where the lighting turns a vivid green, dominated by a prominent Pawn Shop sign and a towering spiral neon structure.
